hooks.command: echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load(sys.stdin).get('file_path',''); exit(1 if any(x in p for x in ['electron-builder.yml','electron.vite.config']) else 0)" && exit 0 || (echo 'WARN: Editing packaging/bundling config. Verify asarUnpack and external lists stay intact.' >&2; exit 0)
